title: chore(deps): update dependency webdriverio to v5.7.8
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| webdriverio | devDependencies | patch | [`5.7.3` -> `5.7.8`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/webdriverio/5.7.3/5.7.8) | [homepage](https://webdriver.io), [source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) |

<summary>webdriverio/webdriverio</summary>

### [`v5.7.8`](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​578-2019-03-28)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/v5.7.6...v5.7.8)

##### :eyeglasses: Spec Compliancy

-   `webdriver`
    -   [#​3784](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3784) Fix parameter name of background app command ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))

##### :rocket: New Feature

-   `webdriverio`
    -   [#​3762](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3762) Add Espresso DataMatcher strategy ([@​dpgraham](https://togithub.com/dpgraham))

##### :nail_care: Polish

-   `wdio-cli`
    -   [#​3781](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3781) Print reporters after/below stdout in final output ([@​klamping](https://togithub.com/klamping))

##### :memo: Documentation

-   `wdio-dot-reporter`
    -   [#​3779](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3779) Docs: Note regarding Dot reporter test failure output in v5 ([@​DT455](https://togithub.com/DT455))
-   `wdio-junit-reporter`
    -   [#​3785](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3785) Update documentation for junit-reporter to reflect v5 options ([@​naddison](https://togithub.com/naddison))
-   Other
    -   [#​3786](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3786) [docs] typo fix ([@​Armanio](https://togithub.com/Armanio))
-   `webdriverio`
    -   [#​3777](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3777) fix typing data for waitFor\* ([@​klamping](https://togithub.com/klamping))

##### :house: Internal

-   Other
    -   [#​3782](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3782) validate typings ([@​mgrybyk](https://togithub.com/mgrybyk))
-   `wdio-appium-service`
    -   [#​3717](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3717) Appium service ([@​MortenGregersen](https://togithub.com/MortenGregersen))

-   `wdio-sauce-service`, `webdriverio`

-   `wdio-runner`

##### :memo: Documentation

    -   [#​3768](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3768) webdriverio: return promise-wrapped async elements from $/$ in async mode ([@​richsilv](https://togithub.com/richsilv))
    -   [#​3752](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3752) webdriverio: Remove commas from param doc block ([@​WillBrock](https://togithub.com/WillBrock))
-   Other
